title: 安田記念の後に・新たながっぷり！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Whew...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! That was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Watching Hishi Akebono and Taiki Shuttle race
was like watching a true clash between titans!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It's fun watching the others run, but there's just
something special about Bono. That intensity of
hers is second to none!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Just watching her makes me feel so much more
energized!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...! Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Taikiii!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yo, Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks for today! I'm glad I got to run with you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Getting to grapple with another big girl like you
was lots and lots of fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But you know... Losing hurts!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Akebono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And that's exactly why I want to race against you
again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I couldn't have said it better myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Today was real excitin' for me too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You can count me in for another round together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain falls on the Yasuda Kinen to
thunderous applause. Then, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, listen to these, Trainer! Fans are already
talking about the Yasuda Kinen online!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"I got to see Bono's fiery bout with Taiki Shuttle
at the Yasuda Kinen in person!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"It was an all-out slugfest of a race, and my heart
is still pounding!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha! I really do look big in this picture, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And everybody is smiling and cheering me on too.
Oh, I'm just so happy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope they'll be just as excited during the next
race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? What's our next race again?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Haha! That's right! We haven't decided yet, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... It'd be nice to do something Taiki'll
run in too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I did! I had lots and lots of fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Running with Biko is fun too, but going against
Taiki was a different kind of fun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It made me feel blazing hot and freezing cold at
the same time and just buzzing with energy! It was
like "Raaah!" and "Whoaaa!" you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't say I understand what she means, but it
seems like her race against Taiki Shuttle was
really special to her.
choice_data_list: Then how about the Sprinters S?
Then how about the Sprinters S?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a G1 sprint, there's a good chance Taiki
Shuttle will run in it too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
She was in it last year too, right?! Yeah, I
definitely wanna run in it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Taiki said she'll be coming back stronger, so I've
gotta to train harder too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we settle on aiming for the Sprinters S.
It's time to push toward an even greater victory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't wait! I gotta try really hard to—
